activities.name: Campaigning
activities.description: Support military armies on campaign to take or defend territory.

actions.name: Support an Imperial Army
actions.description: Adds your military strength to an army. Income only applies if that army receives Imperial guerdon.

actions.name: Campaigning Plot Option
actions.description: Placeholder for specific campaign opportunities added during play.

activities.name: Raiding
activities.description: Launch a foray against enemies of the Empire, focused on disruption, looting, and enemy combatants.

actions.name: Raid the Jotun
actions.description: A legal raid against the Jotun. Provides random resource loot by effective rank.

actions.name: Raid the Druj
actions.description: A legal raid against the Druj. Provides random resource loot by effective rank.

actions.name: Raid the Grendel
actions.description: A legal raid against the Grendel. Provides random resource loot by effective rank.

actions.name: Raiding Plot Option
actions.description: Placeholder for specific raiding opportunities added during play.

activities.name: Guarding
activities.description: Defensive work such as garrisoning a fortification, escorting caravans, or protecting Imperial interests.

actions.name: Mercenary Work
actions.description: Default military downtime if no action is selected. Provides random resource loot by effective rank.

actions.name: Defend a Fortification
actions.description: Adds your military strength to a fortification. Income only applies if the fortification receives Imperial guerdon.

actions.name: Guarding Plot Option
actions.description: Placeholder for specific guarding opportunities added during play.

activities.name: Scouting
activities.description: Infiltration, exploration, reconnaissance, and gathering information in dangerous places.

actions.name: Bounty Hunting
actions.description: Track criminals or threats to Imperial citizens. Provides random resource loot by effective rank.

actions.name: Support an Imperial Spy Network
actions.description: Adds your military strength to a spy network. Income only applies if the spy network receives Imperial guerdon.

actions.name: Scouting Plot Option
actions.description: Placeholder for specific scouting opportunities added during play.

activities.name: Questing
activities.description: Seek danger in search of treasure, experience, and opportunities for glory.

actions.name: Seek Glory
actions.description: Venture into dangerous or unknown places. Provides unpredictable random resource loot by effective rank.

actions.name: Questing Plot Option
actions.description: Placeholder for specific questing opportunities added during play.
